title: tragopogon phaeus
intro: Tragopogon phaeus is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tragopogon phaeus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
